meaning: River 乌苏里江[黑龙江支流]
examples: He whistled cheerfully, first the Kazakh love song "Beautiful Girl" and then the "Wusuli Boat song."
The flood forecast programme for the China Russia boundary river Wusuli river has been draw up according to the corresponding water level (flow) theory.
The case of "Wusuli Boat Song", adjudicated by Chin ese juridical department, is considered to be a leading case involving traditional culture protection.
